name_en: Small Lunch Box Bag Cubi Anagram Shoulder Bag. Made of imported cowhide and jacquard canvas, featuring a repeated Anagram pattern. Shoulder or handbag style. Adjustable shoulder strap. Zipper closure. Cowhide zipper pull. Interior pocket. Herringbone cotton canvas lining. size: 21*17*12.5cm
